name.en-US: Little Office of the Seven Dolours of the Blessed Virgin Mary

description.en-US: A traditional little office in honour of Seven Dolours of the Blessed Virgin Mary, arranged in the canonical hours.

history.en-US:
From the Coeleste Palmetum (1879 edition).

Gemitus Matris tuae ne obliviscaris. — Eccli. 7, 29.
